records.ety: [LL. doxologia, Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ praising, giving glory; <?/ opinion, estimation, glory, praise (from <?/ to think, imagine) + <?/ to speak: cf. F. doxologie. See Dogma, and Legend.]

defs: In Christian worship: A hymn expressing praise and honor to God; a form of praise to God designed to be sung or chanted by the choir or the congregation.
quotes: David breaks forth into these triumphant praises and doxologies.
